parameters.help: Start of DHIS2 period in YYYYMM format.

parameters.label: Detection mode
parameters.help: Partial: fast (~7 min, MAD15 then MAD10). Complete: Partial + seasonal detection, can take several hours.

parameters.help: Send the outliers table to the database for the Shiny app.

parameters.label: Routine data source
parameters.help: Select which routine data to use. 'raw' loads formatted routine data, 'imputed' loads outliers-imputed routine data, 'outliers_removed' loads routine data with outliers removed.

parameters.label: Facility Activity indicators
parameters.help: Define which data elements will be used to determine the activity of a facility. A facility is considered 'active' if at least one of these indicators has a non-missing value greater than zero.

parameters.label: Volume activity indicators
parameters.help: Define which data elements will be used to determine the volume of activity at a facility. Used to calculate WEIGHTED reporting rates.

parameters.label: Denominator method
parameters.help: How to calculate the total number of facilities expected to report.

parameters.label: Use weighted reporting rates
parameters.help: If checked, weighted rates (by volume of activity) populate the REPORTING_RATE column; otherwise unweighted rates are used.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull notebooks from repository
parameters.help: Pull the latest notebooks from the GitHub repository.

parameters.label: Routine data source
parameters.help: Select which routine data to use. 'raw' loads formatted routine data, 'imputed' loads outliers-imputed routine data, 'outliers_removed' loads routine data with outliers removed.

parameters.label: Run reporting notebook only
parameters.help: This will execute only the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull notebooks from repository
parameters.help: Pull the latest notebooks from the GitHub repository.

parameters.label: Part 1: Population reference
parameters.help: Total population for scaling DHIS2 data proportionally.

parameters.label: Part 1: Population year reference
parameters.help: Year matching the population reference.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population under 5
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged under 5.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population pregnant women
parameters.help: Proportion of pregnant women population.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 0-1 years
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 0-1.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 1-2 years
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 1-2.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 5-10 years
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 5-10.

parameters.label: Part 2: Proportion population 5-36 months
parameters.help: Proportion of population aged 5-36 months.

parameters.label: Part 2: Use disaggregation proportions (.csv)
parameters.help: User-uploaded file with population disaggregations at ADM2 level.

parameters.label: Part 3: Projection growth rate
parameters.help: Annual growth rate for projecting population figures.

parameters.label: Part 3: Projection reference year
parameters.help: Base year for population projections.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: Execute only the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Fetch latest scripts from repository.

parameters.label: Method for N1 calculations
parameters.help: Calculate N1 using PRES or SUSP-TEST.

parameters.label: Routine data to use
parameters.help: Which routine data to use: 'raw' (formatted/aligned), 'raw_without_outliers' (outliers removed), 'imputed' (outliers imputed).

parameters.label: Use Transformed Population Data
parameters.help: Use population from the A.5 Population Transformation pipeline (enabled) or A.2 Formatting (disabled).

parameters.label: Analyze by Population Group (only if available)
parameters.help: Select population group; both indicators and population data must be available for selected group.

parameters.label: Care seeking behaviour (CSB) data file (.csv)
parameters.help: Path to CSB data file. If unavailable, pipeline loads DHS data; skips N3 adjustment if neither available.

parameters.label: Run Report only
parameters.help: Execute only the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull notebooks from repository
parameters.help: Fetch latest notebooks from GitHub repository; overwrites local notebook changes.

parameters.label: Minimum number of months per block
parameters.help: Minimum duration of the seasonal block (in months). Used only when running the full pipeline.

parameters.label: Maximum number of months per block
parameters.help: Maximum duration of the seasonal block (in months). Used only when running the full pipeline.

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of cases for seasonality
parameters.help: The proportion of annual cases that must fall within the block to qualify as seasonal (e.g., 0.6 = 60%).

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of seasonal years
parameters.help: The proportion of years that must be classified as seasonal for an ADM2 to be considered seasonal overall.

parameters.label: Use calendar year as denominator
parameters.help: Method to define 'annual' cases for the denominator. FALSE (default): 12-month forward-looking sliding window (WHO approach). TRUE: calendar year (Jan-Dec).

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: Skip calculations and only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Pull scripts
parameters.help: Pull the latest scripts from the repository before execution.

parameters.label: Year start
parameters.help: Start year period for WorldPop population rasters extraction (e.g. 2020).

parameters.label: Year end
parameters.help: End year period for WorldPop population rasters extraction (e.g. 2025).

parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.help: Start year of indicators selection (e.g. 2022).

parameters.help: End year of indicators selection (e.g. 2023).

parameters.label: FOSA location file (.csv)
parameters.help: If not provided, the DHIS2 pyramid metadata file will be used.

parameters.label: Radius around FOSA (meters)
parameters.help: Radius around each FOSA, in meters.

parameters.label: Population raster file (.tif)
parameters.help: If not provided, the default WorldPop raster will be used.

parameters.label: Shapes file (.geojson)
parameters.help: If not provided, the default HMIS/NMDR shapes file will be used.

parameters.help: End date of extraction period. Latest available by default.

parameters.label: Climate data store
parameters.help: Credentials for connection to the Copernicus Climate Data Store.

parameters.label: Run reporting only
parameters.help: This will only execute the reporting notebook.

parameters.label: Minimum number of months per block
parameters.help: Minimum duration of the seasonal block (in months). Used only when running the full pipeline.

parameters.label: Maximum number of months per block
parameters.help: Maximum duration of the seasonal block (in months). Used only when running the full pipeline.

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of rainfall for seasonality
parameters.help: The proportion of annual rainfall that must fall within the block to qualify as seasonal (e.g., 0.6 = 60%).

parameters.label: Minimal proportion of seasonal years
parameters.help: The proportion of years that must be classified as seasonal for an ADM2 to be considered seasonal overall.

parameters.label: Use calendar year as denominator
parameters.help: Method to define 'annual' rainfall for the denominator. FALSE (default): 12-month forward-looking sliding window (WHO approach). TRUE: calendar year (Jan-Dec).

parameters.help: Skip calculations and only execute the reporting notebook.
